QueryCsnBpPrice.name: Name of the bandwidth package, cannot be empty
QueryCsnBpPrice.bandwidth: Bandwidth value of the package; not required for postpaid by traffic billing.
QueryCsnBpPrice.geographicA: Region of the network instance. Values: [ China, Asia-Pacific ], representing Chinese mainland and Asia-Pacific region respectively.
QueryCsnBpPrice.geographicB: Region of the other network instance. Values: [ China, Asia-Pacific ], representing Chinese mainland and Asia-Pacific region respectively.
QueryCsnBpPrice.billing.billingMethod: Required for postpaid. ByTraffic: pay-by-traffic; ByBandwidth: pay-by-bandwidth; PeakBandwidth_Percent_95: 95th percentile billing; Enhanced_Percent_95: enhanced 95th percentile billing
QueryCsnBpPrice.billing.reservation: Reservation info. Not required for postpaid; must be set for prepaid.
